PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?seasonLabel ?year ?raceCount
WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P1346 wd:Q9673 .
  ?season wdt:P580 ?start .
  ?season wdt:P1350 ?raceCount .
  BIND(YEAR(?start) AS ?year)
  FILTER (?year > 2015)
  OPTIONAL { ?season rdfs:label ?seasonLabel FILTER (LANG(?seasonLabel) = "en") }
}
ORDER BY ASC(?raceCount)
LIMIT 3
